title: (Pwn2Own) Samsung Galaxy S25 Samsung Members Open Redirect Security Bypass Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows remote attackers to bypass security on affected installations of Samsung Galaxy S25. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the Samsung Members application. An attacker can force a redirection to a site that serves malicious content. An attacker can leverage this in conjunction with other vulnerabilities to start arbitrary Android exported activites, leading to further compromise.
addtionnal_details: Samsung has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:https://security.samsungmobile.com/serviceWeb.smsb?year=2025&month=11
timeline:
2025-11-18 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-03-16 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-03-16 - Advisory Updated
credit: Ken Gannon / 伊藤 剣 (@yogehi) of Mobile Hacking Lab, and Dimitrios Valsamaras (@Ch0pin)
